name: Hungry Jack (c) Biscuit Barbecups
recipeIngredient: 1 can Hungry Jack (r) Refrigerated Flaky Biscuits (10 oz)
2 oz Shredded Cheddar or American cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 10 muffin cups.
3. Brown ground beef in a large skillet and drain.
4. Stir in barbecue sauce, onion, and brown sugar. Cook for 1 minute to blend flavors, stirring constantly.
5. Separate dough into 10 biscuits.
6. Place one biscuit in each greased muffin cup, pressing firmly into the bottom and up the sides to form a 1/4-inch rim.
7. Spoon about 1/4 cup of meat mixture into each biscuit-lined cup.
8. Sprinkle with cheese.
9. Bake at 400°F for 10-12 minutes or until the edges of biscuits are golden brown. Cool for 1 minute before removing from pan.
10 servings.
TIP: To make ahead, prepare as directed above. Cover and refrigerate for up to 2 hours. Bake as directed above.
